description: Phase 14: Meals v5 — Dashboard nutrition carousel, steps/exercise widgets, weight chart, habit prompt card, discover grid, enhanced FAB bottom sheet, water logging, and new route screens. Source PRDs: meals-v4-dashboard-widgets.md, meals-v4-enhanced-fab.md, meals-v4-navigation-architecture.md, meals-v5-implementation-plan.md

userStories.title: Create todayNutritionProvider and todayRecoveryScoreProvider
acceptanceCriteria: Read PRPs/meals-v5-implementation-plan.md section 3.1 first
Read lib/features/meals/presentation/ for existing providers
Create lib/features/meals/presentation/today_nutrition_provider.dart
todayMacroSummaryProvider(profileId) returns consumed and goal for protein, carbs, fat

todayCalorieSummaryProvider(profileId) composes base from nutritionTargetsProvider, applies PlanType->dayType mapping (push->strength, normal->cardio, easy/rest->rest), applies calorieAdjustmentPercent and calorieModifier for PRO users
todayMicronutrientSummaryProvider(profileId) returns fat, sodium, cholesterol, carbs, sugar, fiber (with null for untracked)
todayNutritionDashboardProvider(profileId) combines all three into single async state
Create lib/features/insights/presentation/today_recovery_score_provider.dart
todayRecoveryScoreProvider(profileId) reads from insightsProvider latestRecoveryScore
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: PrescriptionEngine is static class. Daily prescription via DailyPrescriptionRepository.getTodayPrescription(profileId). currentPlanTierProvider for freemium check. Free users get static MacroCalculator target. PRO users get recovery-adjusted target.

userStories.title: Create NutritionSummaryCarousel with 4 pages
acceptanceCriteria: Read PRPs/meals-v5-implementation-plan.md section 5.1-5.4
Create lib/features/dashboard/presentation/widgets/nutrition_summary_carousel.dart
Create separate files for each page: macro_rings_carousel_page.dart, calories_budget_carousel_page.dart, heart_healthy_carousel_page.dart, low_carb_carousel_page.dart
Create lib/features/dashboard/presentation/widgets/nutrient_progress_bar.dart (shared component)
Page 1 (Macros): Three 80x80dp CustomPainter rings for protein, carbs, fat with 'Xg left' or 'Xg over' centre text
Page 2 (Calories): Large 120x120dp ring, Base Goal / Food Logged / Exercise Calories breakdown, recovery score badge for PRO users
Page 3 (Heart Healthy): Fat / Sodium / Cholesterol progress bars, '--' for untracked nutrients, FreemiumGate wrapped
Page 4 (Low Carb): Carbs / Sugar / Fiber progress bars, '--' for untracked, FreemiumGate wrapped
Dot indicator (smooth_page_indicator or custom) below pages
ShimmerLoading while AsyncLoading, inline error card on failure, zero-state 'Log your first meal' when no food logged
Each page tappable: navigates to /nutrition?tab=macros|calories|heart|lowcarb
Over-goal state: ring color changes to amber when consumed > goal
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Use PageController with StateProvider<int> for active page index. Watch todayNutritionDashboardProvider(profileId) and currentPlanTierProvider. For dot indicator, check pubspec.yaml for smooth_page_indicator first; if absent, use custom AnimatedContainer dot row.

userStories.title: Create Steps and Exercise summary tiles
acceptanceCriteria: Read PRPs/meals-v5-implementation-plan.md section 5.5
Create lib/features/dashboard/presentation/widgets/steps_summary_tile.dart
Create lib/features/dashboard/presentation/widgets/exercise_summary_tile.dart
Steps tile: reads MetricType.steps via todayStepsProvider(profileId), shows step count vs daily target with progress ring
If no Health Connect connected, show '-- steps' with 'Connect' TextButton -> /health/connections
Exercise tile: reads today's completed workouts and shows total exercise calories + duration
Training load indicator for PRO users (from performance engine)
Both tiles side-by-side in a Row with Expanded children
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Add todayStepsProvider to today_nutrition_provider.dart. Use health_repository_impl.dart getMetrics for steps data. Exercise data from workouts feature.

userStories.title: Create WeightTrendChartWidget
acceptanceCriteria: Read PRPs/meals-v5-implementation-plan.md section 5.6 (or PRD-MEALS-V4-001 section 4)
Create lib/features/dashboard/presentation/widgets/weight_trend_chart_widget.dart
90-day line chart using FL Chart, x=date, y=weight in kg/lbs
Goal target line shown as horizontal dashed line (from goalsProvider body_composition goal)
Empty state: 'Log your first weight' with button -> /weight/log
Chart handles single data point without crashing
Tappable: navigates to weight detail or goals screen
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Use goalsProvider(profileId) to find body_composition goal for the target line. Weight data from wt_health_metrics where metric_type='weight'.

userStories.title: Create HabitStreakPromptCard
acceptanceCriteria: Read PRPs/meals-v5-implementation-plan.md section 5.7 (or PRD-MEALS-V4-001 section 5)
Create lib/features/meals/presentation/habit_prompt_provider.dart
Create lib/features/dashboard/presentation/widgets/habit_streak_prompt_card.dart
habitPromptProvider returns contextual nudge based on: logging streak, recovery state, time of day
Examples: 'You have logged meals 5 days in a row!', 'Recovery is low — prioritize rest today'
Card is dismissable — dismissal stored, does not reappear same day
Empty state: no card shown when no relevant prompt
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Prompt rules engine in habit_prompt_provider.dart. Reads from habitProvider streak data and todayRecoveryScoreProvider. Dismissal state can be a simple StateProvider<bool> or stored in Hive.

userStories.title: Create DiscoverQuickAccessGrid
acceptanceCriteria: Read PRPs/meals-v5-implementation-plan.md section 5.8 (or PRD-MEALS-V4-001 section 6)
Create lib/features/dashboard/presentation/widgets/discover_quick_access_grid.dart
2x2 grid of feature tiles: Sleep, Recipes, Workouts, Recovery (configurable)
Each tile: icon, label, tap handler -> appropriate route
Replaces existing SecondaryModulesList if present (remove old widget)
Grid adapts to available modules (if a module is disabled, tile not shown)
PRO-only tiles show lock icon for free users, navigate to /paywall on tap
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Check if SecondaryModulesList exists in dashboard_screen.dart and remove it. Use enabledModulesProvider for dynamic tile list. Navigation uses context.push().

userStories.title: Insert all new widgets into DashboardScreen
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/features/dashboard/presentation/dashboard_screen.dart
Insert NutritionSummaryCarousel as SliverToBoxAdapter after existing header section
Insert Steps/Exercise Row as SliverToBoxAdapter
Insert WeightTrendChartWidget as SliverToBoxAdapter
Insert HabitStreakPromptCard as SliverToBoxAdapter (conditional — only when prompt available)
Insert DiscoverQuickAccessGrid as SliverToBoxAdapter (replace SecondaryModulesList if exists)
Order: existing header -> nutrition carousel -> steps/exercise -> weight chart -> habit prompt -> discover grid -> existing content
All new sections have consistent horizontal padding matching existing dashboard style
Dashboard scrolls smoothly with all new content
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
Verify on Android device
userStories.technicalNotes: DashboardScreen uses CustomScrollView with SliverToBoxAdapter children. Add imports and insert widgets. Do not restructure existing layout.

userStories.title: Create EnhancedLogBottomSheet with 2x2 grid and action list
acceptanceCriteria: Read PRPs/meals-v4-enhanced-fab.md
Read PRPs/meals-v5-implementation-plan.md section 5.9
Create lib/features/meals/presentation/enhanced_log_bottom_sheet.dart
2x2 grid at top: Log Food (green), Barcode Scan (blue), Voice Log (purple, PRO), Meal Scan (orange, PRO)
List below grid: Water, Weight, Exercise, AI Suggestions (Coming Soon), Recipes, Quick Add
Log Food navigates to /meals/food-search
Barcode Scan navigates to /meals/barcode
Voice Log: if PRO, navigate to /meals/voice-log; if free, navigate to /paywall
Meal Scan: if PRO, navigate to /meals/meal-scan; if free, navigate to /paywall
Water opens inline WaterStepperSubSheet (glass count +/- buttons, save to wt_health_metrics)
Weight opens inline weight input -> saves to wt_health_metrics
Exercise navigates to /workouts/new
Recipes navigates to /recipes
Quick Add opens simple calorie/macro input form
Sheet uses DraggableScrollableSheet with rounded top corners
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Use DraggableScrollableSheet with initialChildSize ~0.5. Create FabActionTile widget for the 2x2 grid items. Create fab_colors.dart constants. Voice Log and Meal Scan always visible but PRO-locked for free users.

userStories.title: Add FAB to ScaffoldWithBottomNav and wire to EnhancedLogBottomSheet
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/shared/core/router/scaffold_with_bottom_nav.dart
Add FloatingActionButton to outer Scaffold
floatingActionButtonLocation: FloatingActionButtonLocation.centerFloat
FAB icon: Icons.add with primary color
Tap opens EnhancedLogBottomSheet via showModalBottomSheet
FAB visible on all main tabs (dashboard, meals, workouts, profile)
FAB does not overlap bottom nav items
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
Verify on Android device
userStories.technicalNotes: No BottomAppBar migration needed. Use centerFloat location with existing BottomNavigationBar. The FAB is on the outer Scaffold, not inside any tab.

userStories.title: Register new routes in app_router.dart
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/shared/core/router/app_router.dart
Read PRPs/meals-v4-navigation-architecture.md
Add route: /nutrition -> NutritionDetailScreen (with tab query param)
Add route: /meals/voice-log -> VoiceLogScreen
Add route: /meals/meal-scan -> MealScanScreen
Add route: /water/log -> WaterLogScreen
Add route: /weight/log -> WeightLogScreen
Update /recipes route to pass selectMode parameter when navigating from meal swap
All new routes gated by needsProfile guard
Deep links work for all new routes
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Add routes inside Branch 0 (authenticated routes). Use GoRoute with builder pattern. Import screen files with aliases if needed to avoid name conflicts.

userStories.title: Create NutritionDetailScreen
acceptanceCriteria: Create lib/features/meals/presentation/nutrition_detail_screen.dart
Tab-based screen with tabs matching carousel pages: Macros, Calories, Heart Healthy, Low Carb
Accepts tab query parameter to open on the correct tab
Macros tab: detailed breakdown of protein, carbs, fat with daily history chart
Calories tab: detailed calorie budget breakdown with food diary entries
Heart Healthy / Low Carb tabs: PRO-gated with FreemiumGate
Back button navigates to dashboard
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Use TabController with initialIndex from query param. Read today's nutrition data from todayNutritionDashboardProvider.

userStories.title: Create water logging infrastructure
acceptanceCriteria: Read PRPs/meals-v5-implementation-plan.md section 2.8
Create lib/features/health/presentation/water_log_provider.dart
Water logged as wt_health_metrics with metric_type='water' (no new table needed)
waterLogProvider(profileId) reads today's water entries and returns total glasses/ml
addWaterLog(profileId, ml) inserts new metric entry
WaterStepperSubSheet in EnhancedLogBottomSheet shows glass count with +/- buttons
Each glass = 250ml, increment/decrement by 1 glass
Save button upserts to wt_health_metrics
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Using wt_health_metrics avoids new table migration per implementation plan section 2.8. Use metric_type enum value 'water' if it exists, otherwise use a custom string.

userStories.title: Create VoiceLogScreen and MealScanScreen stubs
acceptanceCriteria: Create lib/features/meals/presentation/voice_log_screen.dart
Create lib/features/meals/presentation/meal_scan_screen.dart
VoiceLogScreen: PRO-only, shows microphone button with 'Describe your meal' prompt
If speech recognition not available, show message and manual text input fallback
MealScanScreen: PRO-only, shows camera viewfinder with 'Take a photo of your meal' prompt
Both screens functional enough to demonstrate the flow, can be enhanced later
Back button on both screens
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: These are MVP implementations. Voice log can use speech_to_text package if available, otherwise text input. Meal scan can use image_picker to capture photo. AI interpretation of voice/photo can be 'Coming Soon' initially.

userStories.title: Create WeightLogScreen
acceptanceCriteria: Create lib/features/health/presentation/screens/weight_log_screen.dart
Simple form: weight input (kg or lbs based on user preference), date (defaults today)
Save writes to wt_health_metrics with metric_type='weight'
Success: SnackBar confirmation and pop back
Validates input: weight must be positive number between 20-500 kg
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Use health_repository_impl.dart saveHealthMetrics for the write. Include dedupe_hash to prevent duplicate entries for same date.

userStories.title: Add smooth_page_indicator package (if not present) and fab_colors constants
acceptanceCriteria: Check pubspec.yaml for smooth_page_indicator
If not present, add smooth_page_indicator: ^1.1.0 to dependencies
Create lib/shared/core/constants/fab_colors.dart with kFabColorLogFood (green), kFabColorBarcode (blue), kFabColorVoice (purple), kFabColorMealScan (orange)
Run flutter pub get successfully
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: If adding smooth_page_indicator causes version conflicts, use custom dot indicator instead. fab_colors.dart should use const Color values matching the design spec in the playground prototype.
